/usr/bin/c++ -W -Wall -pedantic -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -Wwrite-strings -Wpointer-arith -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-variadic-macros -Wshadow -pipe -Qunused-arguments -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION -stdlib=libc++ -std=c++11 -std=c++11  -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -ftree-vectorize -fno-math-errno -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/g4cmpHVeV.dir/g4cmpHVeV.cc.o -o g4cmpHVeV  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/vasilisamalenkiy/Desktop/g4cmp-install/lib
